record.field: Create an invoice for John Smith Invoice Jane $150 for private lessons Generate invoice for the Pro membership Bill the guardian for this month
Send an invoice by email to the customer
Send invoice INV/2026/0001 Email the invoice to John Send the latest invoice to Jane
List payment records with optional filters
Show recent payments List payments received today Who paid this week Show outgoing payments
Register a payment against an invoice
Register payment for INV/2026/0001 Mark invoice as paid Record cash payment for John's invoice Apply payment to the latest invoice
Check account balance (bank, cash, receivable, payable)
What's the bank balance How much cash do we have Account receivable balance How much do customers owe us What's our payable balance
List vendor bills with optional filters
Show vendor bills List unpaid bills What bills are due Show bills from this month
Create a bill from Acme Supply Co Add vendor bill for $500 from Equipment Inc Record a bill for mat cleaning service
